info.title: Operations Center — Machine Device State Reports API
info.description:
Retrieve **device state reports (DSRs)**—call-in history from the machine **terminal** for a date range. Each report captures engine and terminal power, connectivity (RSSI, GPS, Wi‑Fi, cellular), antenna types, battery, boot metadata, and related state. Reports are **identified by the terminal**; one DSR is created per terminal call-in.

**Media type:** Use **`Accept: application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json`**.

**eTags:** This endpoint **does not** support John Deere’s `x-deere-signature` / eTag optimization.

**Links:** Each requested DSR may include links to **`machine`** (if the terminal is linked to a machine) and **`terminal`**. For multi-terminal requests, two or more DSRs may apply.

**Date range defaults:** If neither **`startDate`** nor **`endDate`** is provided, the range defaults to **two months before now** through **now**. If only **`startDate`** is provided, **`endDate`** defaults to **now**. If only **`endDate`** is provided, **`startDate`** defaults to **2015-01-01T00:00:00.000Z**.

**Collections:** Responses use the **CollectionPage** pattern (`total`, `links`, `values`) with **`itemLimit`** / **`pageOffset`** like other platform list APIs.

tags.name: Device state reports
tags.description: Terminal device state and connectivity history for a machine principal id.

OAuth2AuthorizationCode.description: Three-legged OAuth 2.0 (authorization code) for John Deere Precision Tech platform APIs. This endpoint requires **`eq1`**. Request `offline_access` if you need refresh tokens. Discover endpoints from the well-known URL.

scopes.eq1: Equipment Access Level 1 — view equipment and device state reports

Link.description: Hypermedia link (`@type` **Link**). DSR responses may include **`machine`** and **`terminal`** relations.

AbstractMeasurement.description: Deere **abstract measurement** type: strings, doubles, or integers that carry a unit of measurement (for example signal strength or hours).

DeviceStateReport.description: A single **device state report** from a terminal at a point in time. Field names and shapes may vary by firmware; common concepts include engine state, terminal power state, RSSI, GPS/Wi‑Fi/cellular diagnostics, antenna types, battery voltage, boot type/timestamp, and vehicle power state. **Engine state:** `0` = power-on key OFF, `1` = ON. **Terminal power state:** `0` = power-on key ON, `1` = OFF, `2` = SLEEPING, `3` = HIBERNATING.

links.description: May include **`machine`** (if terminal is linked to a machine) and **`terminal`**.

terminalPowerState.description: Terminal power: `0` = power-on key ON, `1` = OFF, `2` = SLEEPING, `3` = HIBERNATING.

rssi.description: Received signal strength (cellular/Wi‑Fi context per product).

DeviceStateReportCollectionPage.description: Paged collection of device state reports (**CollectionPage** pattern).

total.description: Total number of values available for this query.

values.description: Device state report items for this page.

get.description:
Returns **device state reports** for the machine identified by **`principalId`**. Each report reflects a **terminal** call-in and includes connectivity and power diagnostics (engine state, terminal power, RSSI, GPS/Wi‑Fi/GSM state, antenna types, battery, boot metadata, and related fields). The report is **terminal-specific** regardless of which machine the terminal is connected to. This API **does not** support eTags.

**OAuth scope:** `eq1`

**Request URL:** `GET https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/machines/{principalId}/deviceStateReports`

parameters.name: principalId
parameters.description: Machine **principal id** for the machine whose terminal device state reports you are reading (from platform machine or equipment resources).

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Range start (**ISO 8601**, UTC). If omitted with **`endDate`**, defaults to **2015-01-01T00:00:00.000Z**. If both omitted, defaults to **two months before** the current time.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Range end (**ISO 8601**, UTC). If omitted with **`startDate`**, defaults to **now**. If both omitted, defaults to **now**.

parameters.name: itemLimit
parameters.description: Page size: multiples of **10**, maximum **100** (John Deere **CollectionPage** convention).

parameters.name: pageOffset
parameters.description: Zero-based offset aligned with **`itemLimit`** (0, 10, 20, … or 0, 100, 200, … when `itemLimit=100`).

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Use **`application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json`** for Axiom v3 JSON responses.

200.description: Success — collection of device state reports (**CollectionPage** with `values`).

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid bearer token, expired access token, or application not licensed for the API.

403.description: Forbidden — user or client cannot access this machine or required OAuth scopes (ensure **`eq1`**) are not granted. May also indicate organization connection or terms (RCA) issues; check **X-Deere-Warning** / **X-Deere-Terms-Location** when present.

404.description: Not found — **`principalId`** is not valid for the caller’s accessible resources.

429.description: Too many requests — honor **Retry-After** when returned.

503.description: Service unavailable — retry with backoff; honor **Retry-After** when returned.
